psd.interpretation: Spectral index α = -0.72. Kolmogorov MHD turbulence predicts −1.67. Shallower than −5/3 → energy injection (shock, CME).

explanations.beta: β = 0.801 — Magnetically dominated. Alfvén waves govern dynamics.
explanations.alfven: V_A = 60.7 km/s — Alfvén wave speed along field lines.
explanations.mach_a: M_A = 6.77 — flow/Alfvén speed. Super-Alfvénic — bow shock forms at Earth.
explanations.mach_s: M_s = 2878305925282.23 — flow/sound speed. Supersonic — shocks can form.

events.explanation: Bz = -5.5 nT (southward, GSE). Dayside magnetopause reconnection active via Dungey cycle. Enhanced energy input to magnetosphere — monitor Dst and Kp indices.
